programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Reunión
programme.desc: El equipo descubre que la extraña muerte de un marine y sus dos amigos puede estar relacionada con su pasado, pero es Gibbs quien acaba haciendo un viaje al pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Informante
programme.desc: El equipo debe investigar de nuevo la muerte de un teniente después de que el bloguero que les acusó de encubrimiento aparezca muerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La verdad sobre mentir
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una adolescente empujada al metro. Frank se molesta por la supervisión del nuevo Inspector General en el NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Desaparecida
programme.desc: Danny y Baez sospechan que una niña podría ser víctima de secuestro, pero su madre lo niega, aunque su historia no cuadra. Mientras, Frank visita a un sacerdote, consejero del NYPD, arrestado por conducir ebrio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Músculo
programme.desc: Jamie es cuestionado por la muerte de un pandillero que perseguía. Baez se infiltra para investigar al prometido de la ex de Danny, quien vende drogas desde su gimnasio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuestas mortales
programme.desc: Un oficial es acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, lo que pone al departamento bajo escrutinio. Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un corredor de valores endeudado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres personas implicadas en asesinatos, afirman que fueron atacadas por un “monstruo sombrío con garras” en el momento en que ocurrió cada crimen. La UAC busca a un sospechoso que controla sus mentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando aparecen víctimas de disparos en el área de Los Ángeles en una posible relación con actividades criminales, la UAC busca a un justiciero sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Verdad o consecuencias
programme.desc: Mientras comienza la búsqueda del sustituto de Ziva, Gibbs y los miembros restantes de su equipo deben volver al trabajo con el pasado todavía pesando en sus mentes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Reunión
programme.desc: El equipo descubre que la extraña muerte de un marine y sus dos amigos puede estar relacionada con su pasado, pero es Gibbs quien acaba haciendo un viaje al pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Informante
programme.desc: El equipo debe investigar de nuevo la muerte de un teniente después de que el bloguero que les acusó de encubrimiento aparezca muerto.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de dos estudiantes de secundaria, uno muerto y el otro desaparecido, llevan a los CSI a unas carreras callejeras de coches y a su complicada red de competición mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts toma el centro del escenario cuando un miembro de la banda es electrocutado por su propia guitarra durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI investiga si fue un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un niño pequeño es encontrado asesinado, el equipo de CSI descubre evidencia que puede vincular su muerte con un viejo caso que resurgió recientemente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y el detective Vartann pasan 24 horas juntos en una habitación de hotel mientras vigilan a un dúo que fabrica drogas en la habitación de al lado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga el brutal asesinato de una familia, rastrean al asesino hasta la casa de al lado, que podría pertenecer al asesino en serie "Dr. Jekyll".

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es descubierto asesinado en la escuela de Lindsey, la investigación da un giro brusco cuando el equipo de CSI descubre una conexión poco probable entre la muerte del niño y atrocidades del pasado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un cómico legendario de los viejos tiempos de Las Vegas se reunirá con su compañero en el escenario solo por una noche, hasta que uno de ellos es encontrado muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una madre que se pensaba que estaba de duelo por la pérdida de su familia hace tres años se convierte en sospechosa en una investigación de CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston lucha por su vida después de ser apuñalado por un psicópata, Nate Haskell, mientras que los otros CSI asisten a un funeral que se vuelve mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La histeria se produce cuando un tiburón ataca a una mujer en la piscina de un casino de Las Vegas. El equipo de CSI debe determinar si el asesino es humano o tiburón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una convención de vampiros y hombres lobo está en el corazón de una investigación del asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A kidnapping case becomes personal for Horatio and the CSI team when the victim unexpectedly turns out to be Boa Vista's sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en un partido de roller derby, lo único más corto que las faldas de las chicas es su paciencia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Miami arde en crímenes y caos cuando Memmo Fiero, el asesino de la esposa de Horatio Caine, regresa para tomar el control de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI tratan de descubrir cuál de los nerdos se vengó cuando un bravucón de la escuela secundaria murió apedreado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer escapa por poco de la muerte a manos de un asesino en serie, Horatio hará cualquier cosa para rastrear al psicópata.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren un club de caza exclusivo donde la presa es humana, el juego más peligroso de todos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un chofer de camión de reparto y un ama de casa de su ruta son asesinados, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI intentan encontrar una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un presidiario fugitivo toma a Natalia como rehén y le cuenta un secreto impactante sobre sus crímenes. Horatio Caine y el resto del equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine ha decidido proteger a un luchador de artes marciales mixtas de su peligroso hermano que recientemente se escapó de la cárcel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The witness to a brutal elevator slaying has disappeared, and as the CSIs track her down they uncover the world of Manhattan “Lolitas.”

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio Caine follow the evidence from steamy Miami to steely New York as they close in on Henry Darius.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, the CSIs work to find out why what they thought was a cheater’s revenge was misidentification.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll “hospital”, Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll “doctor” beneath hundreds of body parts – doll body parts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A rising roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a bout, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate the death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead in his bedroom, when Danny begins to process the scene he trips a panic button, sealing himself in with the victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Los dueños de perros competidores se convierten en los principales sospechosos de una investigación de asesinato cuando el detective Mac Taylor examina la muerte de un adiestrador de perros.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Tanglewood (S1 Ep13)
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un chico suburbano encontrado muerto a golpes en Van Cortlandt Park lleva al equipo de CSI a Tanglewood, hogar de un grupo de aspirantes a gánsters.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren el cuerpo de un adolescente metido en una caja de 60 x 60 x 60 cm enterrada en la arena en Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Los detectives Mac Taylor y Danny Messer se encuentran tras la pista de un asesino escurridizo cuando una futura novia cae muerta el día de su boda.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el robo de un camión, los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren un cuerpo aplastado bajo diez toneladas de acero.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español

programme.title: Recién cazado

programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.desc: Una abogada se enfrenta a su antiguo novio para defender su pequeña ciudad de la demolición.

programme.title: Return of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Trapeze
programme.desc: Aerialist Burt Lancaster--who retired after suffering an injury--agrees to train aspiring trapeze artist Tony Curtis. But when both men fall in love with the beautiful and ambitious Gina Lollobrigida, the triangle threaten the dreams of them all.

programme.title: Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Charlton Heston stars as Brad Braden, the circus manager who lives and breathes to keep the show rolling. With the Big Top about to hit rock bottom, Braden hires The Great Sebastian, a daring trapeze legend, to revitalize the circus.

programme.title: The Vikings
programme.desc: Legends Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Ernest Borgnine and Janet Leigh dazzle in this epic chronicle of brutal rivalry and bloodthirsty ambition as two brothers are locked in a battle that will decide their fate...and that of a beautiful princess.

programme.title: The Buccaneer
programme.desc: General Andrew Jackson's dependence on the help of pirate Jean Lafitte to repel the British is complicated by the Governor's daughter. Set in New Orleans during the War of 1812.

programme.title: Funny Face
programme.desc: Paris, the City of Light, shines even brighter when Audrey Hepburn and Fred Astaire team up for the only time and bring their luminous starpower to this exquisite musical featuring songs by George and Ira Gershwin.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The Douglas's stove breaks down on Thanksgiving Day. There's no way to get it fixed that same day and every restaurant in town is booked.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While Mike and Robbie go camping in the woods, Chip and Steve go "rafting" in the backyard.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Lonesome George Gobel is in town for a benefit and escapes to the Douglas household for some "quiet" time.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some loose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue to divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude hires an English housekeeper who arrives on the day of the charity party for 'women's rights,' but within hours Maude is trying to fire her.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur has put his wife in a state of shock by telling her he's invited six couples over for dinner but Maude takes over with a flourish -- after all, what are friends for?

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter returns home from his annual fishing trip convinced that he and Maude should sell the house and the appliance store and move to the Canadian wilderness.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: What happens when a married man has a heart attack at one o'clock in the morning in a young girl's apartment? Walter's biggest problem is not surviving the heart attack but surviving Maude learning the truth.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude gets contrary and is ready to mow down 'The Duke' with a verbal barrage when he stops in Tuckahoe to publicize a movie. John Wayne, playing himself, plans to have lunch in the home of his number-one fan -- Dr. Arthur Harmon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: An affectionate postcard from an old boyfriend rekindles a flame in Maude's heart -- until she learns Vivian received a similar card from the same man.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter and Arthur go off on a fishing trip and land in jail while Maude and Vivian stay home and go on an eating binge. Furious at their husbands for leaving them alone, Maude and Vivian go off their diets with a vengeance.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter are having a sleepless night. The snowstorm which may ruin Walter's annual sale at the appliance store seems important until Maude admits her insomnia is due to her doctor's advice that she have a hysterectomy.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: With the weight of the women's lib movement resting squarely on her shoulders, Maude takes up her duties as manager over three men in a real estate office.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: After hearing a man's laughter in the middle of the night, Maude accuses Carol of sneaking a man into her room. After Carol angrily, but regretfully, denies the accusation, Maude's suspicions focus on that 'feisty old biddy,' Mrs. Naugatuck.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie gets fed up with a television editorial when this week's issue concerns gun control. Archie rails against gun control, battles it out with Mike and ultimately decides to go on the TV show with a rebuttal.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's Sunday job, driving taxi cabs for Bert Munson, has been a fine extra job for additional income. However, Archie has failed to report the extra income on his tax returns, and soon discovers that he will be audited by the IRS.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria has become friends with a girl named Tammy and they have been organizing a Women's Fair. Male chauvinism is put to the test when Gloria poses a riddle to Mike and Archie who are stumped when they can't come up with the answer.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie gets word that an old Army buddy who once saved his life is coming to town with his wife, Bobbi Jo. When Bobbi Jo arrives early, Archie gets an eyeful of the voluptuous woman and his guilt over his lust begins to show through to Mike and Gloria.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The twelve-year-old daughter of a murdered mother goes after the killer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller goes undercover at a mental hospital to uncover the truth about a string of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett's unit searches for the conspirators who framed nightclub star Jimmy Nuanu, a crusader for ecological balance in Hawaii, to make him appear to be the saboteur of an inadequate sewage treatment plant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Distinguished actor Hume Cronyn guest stars as Avery Filer, a master burglar of such brazen daring that he ignites a political inferno.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A strangler who writes the poetry of Byron in lipstick on the legs of two victims, one of them Danny's fiancée, must be stopped in time to prevent a third murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett must apprehend a hoodlum and his girlfriend in order to save their lives. The two are being sought by two men from whom they stole a large cash ransom which they acquired by carrying out an abduction.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Monte Markham plays convicted murderer Harry Kellem, whom Five-O must try to prove innocent in order to save the life of a prison doctor who Kellem is holding hostage

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett's investigation into the death of a real estate agent leads to the island of Maui.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: As the arrests grow, Gillespie, Tibbs and the Sparta police force are desperate to halt the spread of crack cocaine among the young people of their town, and no one is more motivated than Officer Willson Sweet, whose cousin died from using the drug.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is let go after being abducted by white supremacists right before the upcoming visit of a civil rights leader, Rev. John Carter, and the anniversary of a historic march. Tibbs is excited to meet Carter, but Gillespie anticipates trouble.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer Parker Williams must face his feelings when his neighbor, a dance instructor he's fallen for, is accused of killing a private investigator who was hot on her trail regarding the alleged abduction of the child she's raising as her daughter.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Two men are determined to avenge their brother's death after he is killed in a thwarted armed robbery by an off-duty Lieutenant Bubba Skinner. Chief Gillespie must prepare to do all he can to keep Bubba safe. Now, he just needs Bubba to cooperate.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While hitchhiking his way to Sparta to visit Chief Gillespie, a Vietnamese teenager, Hank, witnesses a store robbery that turns into a murder. Hank was hoping that Gillespie would help him acquire citizenship, but now he's being framed for murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ex-prizefighter, King Baylor, tries to blackmail his old boss, John Caminetto, a mafia kingpin in Detroit, who is wanted by the FBI. The FBI offers Baylor a deal, but he's desperate for cash and thinks he can force Caminetto to pay a bigger sum.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter is frustrated in his pursuit of a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to systematically kill the participants in the man's trial.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover in a logging camp to investigate possible lumber smuggling by a ruthless Japanese businessman.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver heads down to Peru to investigate the death of an old friend's father, who was searching for legendary Incan treasure.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver sets up a sting operation to catch a criminal suspected of fixing horse races and laundering money for a Cuban drug lord.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover to investigate the theft of a valuable sonar detecting device.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda's cousin falls to his death when his motorcycle suddenly veers off the road. Amanda leads the investigation when it's discovered her cousin was drugged immediately before the accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a free health clinic after several homeless people turn up dead... with missing organs.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to solve a friend's murder while Steve investigates the deceased's ex-wife and her identical twin sister.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A visiting surgeon must deal with his alcoholism after a fellow doctor is murdered during one of his blackouts.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip collects items for the school's annual rag drive. One neighbor notices all the strange happenings at the Douglas home. Bub appears drunk, Robbie carries a dummy in the house, and Chip talks to the dummy and drops it out the window.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Bub tries to fit into family life, but the boys find things difficult when Bub speaks against a PTA mother, shows up at school with a forgotten lunch, and seems to interfere with girlfriends. Turns out, all the help was needed.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A telecast of a countdown to a 1957 satellite launch provides the backdrop for a Monday morning in the Douglas household. Everyone seems to be unusually tired.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie (Don Grady) finds out that a popular girl in school likes him, except that she (Cheryl Holdridge) confuses Robbie with Mike (Tim Considine).

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan feels disrespected and ignored by her brothers and sisters, so she tells everyone that she wishes she was an only child. Meanwhile, Carol and Alice have a competition over who can cook the best strawberry preserves.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike thinks Greg wants to be an architect after reading Greg's school essay, but Greg doesn't want to hurt Mike's feelings and tell him the truth. Meanwhile, the other Brady kids also begin thinking about their future careers.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids give Alice the cold shoulder after they think she has broken their trust, so Alice decides to leave her job as housekeeper. However, the kids soon regret the decision after the new housekeeper teaches them a lesson.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia thinks that a girl who is suddenly interested in Greg is actually using him so that Greg will vote for her as head cheerleader--over Marcia.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter tries out for the role of George Washington in a school play, but gets the role of Benedict Arnold instead. But he then wants to quit the play altogether when his classmates start branding him as a "traitor."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia has a crush on her new dentist, which only intensifies when she mistakes an opportunity to babysit for him as a date with him to the ballet.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby doesn't want to be safety monitor for his class because his classmates now hate him. However, he soon abuses his power and begins reporting on his family when they break house rules. Meanwhile, the family salvages an old sailboat.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes obsessed with Jesse James. Mike and Carol don't approve of his new hero, and try to find a way to convince him that James was nothing but a "mean, dirty killer."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia breaks a date with Charlie when "big man on campus" Doug Simpson asks her out. However, after she gets hit in the nose with a football, Doug Simpson breaks his date with her.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter gets a job at the bike shop, but he is fired after three days. He doesn't want to tell his parents the bad news, because he told the family he might be getting a promotion to salesman the day he got fired.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy loses her mom's earrings after playing with them, and "detective" Peter Brady tries to solve the mystery. But when Carol wants the earrings for a costume ball and they're still not found, the entire family tries to crack the case.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady girls try to play matchmaker between Carol's free-spirited grandmother and stick-in-the-mud Grandpa Brady.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's sister, Frannie, has just passed away, and she is determined to give her late sister something she never had a "perfect day." But things soon turn from perfect to terrible as one disaster after another strikes.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama discovers Fran is worth $35,000 and stipulates that a portion would be split evenly between Mama, Vint, and Naomi. One stipulation stands between Mama and the money, she has to keep from losing her temper for 2 weeks.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen stops by with a gift for Mama and to attempt to once again apologize for missing her Aunt Fran's funeral. Mama refuses to forgive her and throws her out. Later, the family learns that Ellen is in the hospital.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama's dreams start providing the names of winning horses, the family figures they're in the money.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama, Iola and Naomi decide to have a chili cook-off with the winner getting her recipe in the church bazaar cookbook. Vint is choosen, against his will, as the judge of the contest.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Vint and Naomi are having trouble in the bedroom, Mama and Iola soon discover exactly what it is when they turn on Good Morning Raytown, and special guest Dr. Joyce Brothers agrees to take a few phone calls live on-air.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Iola is distraught when her cat Midnight dies, although everyone else is thankful. But Iola refuses to let go and nothing can console her---until she decides to have it freeze-dried.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Naomi gives Bubba and Vint a love test to see how romantic they are, it turns out Vint is a "cold fish" and Bubba is a "Red Hot Romeo." Vint decides to be more romantic and talks Bubba into writing her a love letter.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Iola's beloved pearls have mysteriously disappeared, she is quick to accuse Bubba, who comes in with a brand new drum set.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama wants to be named President of the Church Ladies League, so she invites the Reverend and Alberta Meechum to dinner. It's just then that Bubba sees in the newspaper that one of his former inmates at Juvenile Hall has escaped

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Unhappy with the rut she's gotten into, Naomi decides to make a change and arrives home with the news that, after seeing an ad in the paper, she's decided to attend school to train as a flight attendant.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Nine years after the murders of a mother and her teenage daughters, a wiretapped conversation helps police to crack the case. And the baffling murder of a Virginia woman is solved when human bones are discovered by a geologist in North Carolina.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found shot to death it looks like police may have stumbled upon a multi-party murder plot. And, a wife remains a key suspect in her husband's murder case for six years, until she attempts to prove her own innocence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Years Day 1985, a little boy is left motherless. A family must wait 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, the brutal murder of 19-year-old Tiffany Johnston rocks the small town of Bethany, Oklahoma. DNA points to her killer over a decade later and leads investigators across state lines.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Guns found dumped in a pond help police to solve the 15-year-old murder of Detroit cab company owner. And the rape and murder of an Atlanta TV station receptionist goes cold for 20 years before DNA links a man to the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.desc: After 19 years, Kansas detectives reopen the case of a banker found beaten to death in his bed--and the chief suspect is his cheating wife. And a man with a guilty conscience helps Arkansas police to crack a cold case of murder.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The last time Crystal was here, she got a DNA denial, but is back to test another potential father. Then, Aaron and his new girlfriend say there's no way Aaron is the father of Marissa's baby. What truths will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today on MAURY…Gary comes home with marks on his body, which makes Heather question his fidelity. Then, Ramze's wife says he's giving out discounts in exchange for sexual favors. Plus, Shavon reveals a secret that could end her 7-year relationship!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On today's MAURY… It's jilted lovers at their wit's end and accused cheaters put to the test. These women are desperate to know if their men are cheating on them. But these men say they're just being jealous and overprotective. Tune in today!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On today's MAURY… these women are turning to MAURY for something more than excuses. They need RESULTS! After the truth is revealed, will these fathers finally face the music, or will these moms have to continue their searches?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. What will they say when they watch him on our hidden cameras? Then, was Naomi's fiancé able to resist our sexy decoy? Plus, is Jeremiah's baby with Robin really his?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On today’s MAURY, Maurio says he didn’t father 5 kids. But when all 5 tests are revealed will he be proven correct, or a five-time loser? Jon’s family says he’s not Courtney’s child’s father! Will the test results say otherwise?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Toni’s fiancée is a tattoo artist and wants to know if he’s been making his mark in bed with other women. Is Sandy’s fiancé cheating with married women? Is Juanita's fiancé a cheater?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Take the Test ... Did You Cheat?
programme.desc: These women are at their wit's end because they suspect their lovers of infidelity. These men swear that they’re just crazy or jealous, but Maury’s got the lie detector results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: It's more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía de Alaska encontró el cuerpo de una mujer mientras patrullaba de rutina un parque público.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cazador de Colorado que había recibido tres disparos fue víctima de un crimen bien planeado. Los investigadores sospecharon dos armas y dos asesinos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película
programme.desc: La hora de la muerte se vuelve fundamental después de que se encuentra asesinada a una mujer embarazada en su habitación con aire acondicionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio
programme.desc: La muerte de una mujer en Pensilvania desencadena una investigación por homicidio sobre la muerte de otra mujer en Carolina del Norte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.desc: After Drew moves out, there's a break-in at the loft, and Fiona fears for her safety. Someone from Dallas' past pays him a surprise visit. A tough assignment forces Zig to think about the mistakes he's made.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles helps Maya discover who is behind her video going viral. Maya's hellbent on revenge, getting her into hot water.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Student council prez Drew is psyched about his Degrassi TV interview but when the story sheds a negative light, Drew’s stunned.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is excited to have Bianca back in town for Thanksgiving but is surprised when she isn't as forthcoming as he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Alli’s birthday, but all she can think about is Leo being sent back to France.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli is still lying to protect Leo, but her stories are beginning to unravel. Maya shows her rubber room classmates that she isn’t a princess.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Are sparrows and blackbirds the direct descendents of a vicious group of dinosaurs including the velociraptor?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's toughest cases have included a bulldog that munched on skateboards, a dog that gnawed garden hoses and basketballs, and a pit bull with issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Dex's plan to free Caress from prison succeeds, as she returns to Denver with a fever for revenge; Sammy Jo is pregnant with Clay's baby and warns Steven no court would deny her custody of Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress vows retribution for her years of imprisonment; Michael Culhane uses Zach Powers to acquire thirty percent of "The Crater" project; Sammy Jo tells a distraught Clay of her pregnancy; Caress blackmails Emily Falimont.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A dying Emily begs Blake to use the letter she wrote to bring an end to Alexis and Ben's treachery; Clay and Sammy Jo are married, Nick Kimball relentlessly pursues Dominique's affections; Blake rejects Michael Culhane's efforts for a reconciliation.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Using Emily's letter, Blake devises a way to regain his empire; Sammy Jo learns she is not pregnant, but keeps it a secret from Clay; fearing Michael Culhane's deceitful intentions.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo fears she will lose Clay if he learns about her false pregnancy; Adam discovers the identity of the mysterious woman tormenting Ben; An explosion rips through an oil rig, trapping Blake amidst raging flames, as Ben leaves him to die.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Ben returns to Blake's aid and pulls him to safety, both narrowly escaping the devastation of the ensuing explosion; Blake suffers memory loss due to the explosion; Alexis leads Blake to believe they have been married for the past twenty-three years.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo informs Clay of her desire for an annulment to their marriage; Dominique is roughed up by thugs threatening her to cooperate with their boss, as Gary Tilden coincidentally returns to Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Blake's once passionate feelings for Alexis may still be lingering; Blake and Ben reach a mutual reconciliation; Amanda disappears to London; Leslie Carrington finds Ben.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Clay reluctantly signs the annulment papers to end his and Sammy Jo's marriage; Blake persuades Leslie Carrington to stay in Denver and give Ben a second chance; Adam proposes to Dana.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina lapses into unconsciousness, as doctors fight against time to bring her back; Krystle rebuffs Alexis' sincere concern for Krystina's health; Steven and Sammy Jo assume the appearance of a normal marriage for Danny's sake.

programme.desc: The American Ninja burst onto the screen in a fourth round of martial arts Action.
